purpose: Shared duplicate-control ledger for LLM Midday Brief and LLM Night Lite scheduled reports.
seed_limitations: Seeded from available ChatGPT task/conversation history summaries, not from full historical scheduled-output bodies.

treatment: Do not recap as a new model story. Treat future mentions as duplicates unless access, pricing, API availability, public rollout, or official documentation materially changes.

Prior schedule summary indicated pricing/access clarification was covered around 2026-06-28.

New API/Codex/ChatGPT access state, pricing, rate limit, or Help Center change.
Credible correction to the prior understanding.
notes: Exact prior article body was not accessible from this chat.

canonical_title: Anthropic Mythos 5 partial or limited restore
treatment: Ongoing restore story. Do not re-articleize unless availability scope, API behavior, organization eligibility, or official restrictions change.
known_facts: Prior schedule summaries mention Mythos 5 partial restore.
Later prior summary stated Mythos 5 remained approved only for some US organizations while Fable 5 was globally restored.
reinclude_only_if: Global availability or major eligibility change.
New official Anthropic model/platform documentation.
API behavior materially changes.
Credible restriction, deprecation, or policy correction.
notes: Keep separate from Fable 5; do not merge the two unless the source explicitly treats them together.

treatment: Major story already covered. Re-include only as 続報 with a concrete hard delta. Avoid daily rehash of restore status or user reactions.
known_facts: Prior schedule summaries covered Fable 5 restore watch before restoration.
Prior schedule summary stated Claude Fable 5 restored globally on 2026-07-01 across Claude Platform, Claude.ai, Claude Code, and Cowork.
Prior schedule summary mentioned a Fable 5 weekly-cap promotion through 2026-07-07.
reinclude_only_if: API callability, model list behavior, or Messages API behavior materially changes.
Weekly-cap promotion, pricing, rate limit, export restriction, or regional availability changes.
Official Anthropic correction, model card, release note, or incident note appears.
Reproducible benchmark or workflow finding changes practical usage guidance.
notes: This is likely the highest-risk duplicate topic. Require explicit '前回からの差分:' before any future main-section inclusion.
